tasks.name: identity
tasks.top_friction: status help text doesn't mention 'user'/'auth', so whoami-style keyword discovery is slightly harder

tasks.name: list teams
tasks.top_friction: no 'team' terminology — agents using ClickUp API naming won't find workspace list without --help

tasks.name: hierarchy
tasks.top_friction: --format must precede the subcommand, which is non-obvious

tasks.name: my tasks
tasks.top_friction: README omits task mine; discoverable only via --help

tasks.name: sort
tasks.top_friction: finding a list ID requires a separate discover hierarchy call

tasks.name: create+delete
tasks.top_friction: create returns a large JSON blob; no one-line id+url summary

tasks.name: update flow
tasks.top_friction: update response gives no indication of which fields changed

tasks.name: search
tasks.top_friction: --format after the subcommand produces an unhandled stack trace instead of a hint

tasks.name: task get+comments
tasks.top_friction: unknown list alias passed raw to API yields opaque 'List ID invalid' instead of an alias hint

tasks.name: bulk export
tasks.top_friction: two near-identical export commands (task export vs bulk export-tasks)

tasks.name: most-active list
tasks.top_friction: no list-level activity summary; requires triangulating hierarchy + task search (known baseline gap)

tasks.name: no-flag flow
tasks.top_friction: three-hop discovery to find a list ID; setup wizard needs IDs the agent doesn't have yet
